artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found two public University of Padova GenAI documents: an Ateneo policy-direction PDF covering teaching and research, and a research-specific GenAI guidelines PDF. Moodle forum pointers, thesis/course-level material, and old event/news pages were documented but not used as claim evidence.

artifacts.title: Università di Padova GenAI guidance staged review
artifacts.summary: The staged run found two official University of Padova GenAI sources: an Ateneo policy-direction PDF for responsible GenAI use in teaching and research, and an official research-specific GenAI guidelines PDF. Claims are limited to the source language around guidance scope, privacy/confidential information, assessment and thesis disclosure plus authorization, teaching-staff communication responsibilities, and research responsibility/authorship.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged run did not crawl www.unipd.it pages after robots.txt returned Disallow: *.
Claims are staged candidates only and are not marked canonical or human reviewed.
